tasks.label: translation-sync-part1-marker
tasks.command: $marker = 'c:\Users\Matthias\Desktop\Fallout Immersion Project\Tools\TranslationSync\state\part1-task-status.txt'; Remove-Item -LiteralPath $marker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; try { Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass; & 'c:\Users\Matthias\Desktop\Fallout Immersion Project\Tools\TranslationSync\Invoke-TranslationSync.ps1' -Command sync -Category part1 -Languages English,German,ChineseSimplified; Set-Content -LiteralPath $marker -Value 'success' -Encoding UTF8 } catch { Set-Content -LiteralPath $marker -Value (($_ | Out-String) + [Environment]::NewLine + $_.ScriptStackTrace) -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }

tasks.label: translation-sync-process-check
tasks.command: $out = 'c:\Users\Matthias\Desktop\Fallout Immersion Project\Tools\TranslationSync\state\translation-processes.json'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'powershell.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*Invoke-TranslationSync.ps1*' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $out -Encoding UTF8

tasks.label: translation-sync-stop-duplicates
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'powershell.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*Invoke-TranslationSync.ps1*' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }

tasks.label: translation-sync-process-check-2
tasks.command: $out = 'c:\Users\Matthias\Desktop\Fallout Immersion Project\Tools\TranslationSync\state\translation-processes-2.json'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'powershell.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*Invoke-TranslationSync.ps1*' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $out -Encoding UTF8

tasks.label: translation-sync-part1-clean
tasks.command: $marker = 'c:\Users\Matthias\Desktop\Fallout Immersion Project\Tools\TranslationSync\state\part1-task-status.txt'; Remove-Item -LiteralPath $marker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; try { Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass; & 'c:\Users\Matthias\Desktop\Fallout Immersion Project\Tools\TranslationSync\Invoke-TranslationSync.ps1' -Command sync -Category part1 -Languages English,German,ChineseSimplified; Set-Content -LiteralPath $marker -Value 'success' -Encoding UTF8 } catch { Set-Content -LiteralPath $marker -Value (($_ | Out-String) + [Environment]::NewLine + $_.ScriptStackTrace) -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }

tasks.label: translation-sync-process-check-clean
tasks.command: $out = 'c:\Users\Matthias\Desktop\Fallout Immersion Project\Tools\TranslationSync\state\translation-processes-clean.json'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'powershell.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*Invoke-TranslationSync.ps1*' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $out -Encoding UTF8

tasks.label: translation-sync-cpu-check
tasks.command: $out = 'c:\Users\Matthias\Desktop\Fallout Immersion Project\Tools\TranslationSync\state\translation-process-stats.json'; Get-Process -Id 5328 | Select-Object Id, CPU, WorkingSet64, StartTime | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $out -Encoding UTF8
